div.p: Generative Reconciliation Perception Imagine. Observe. Reconcile. Act.
AFFORDANCES Elements as action potentials "What can I DO here?"
REVERSE-ENGINEER End-state → action sequence Code or motor commands
PLANNER Spreading activation through MWM Goal → relevant actions
MOTOR SYSTEM Bezier mouse · Gaussian typing Momentum scroll · Human-like
Interpretable Graph (sibling repo, separate substrate) Site patterns · Causal edges Spreading activation Reconsolidation on surprise
NEXT-STATE Generate expected next state "What should happen if I act?"
END-STATE Imagine final state or video "What should it look like at the end?"
DIFF Prediction error imagination vs reality
VISUAL CORTEX Screenshot + SoM Layout, colors, spatial
ANALYTICAL CORTEX DOM / a11y / macOS AX Structure, state, handlers
RECONCILER (collaborative) Merge dual views Disagreement = information imagined and observed converge
ALIGNMENT CRITIC Haiku on every action "Does this serve the intent?"
SECURITY MEMBRANE Content isolation HTTP sandbox Credential vault
